name: IdsFepProvLocRowCntBal

sqlReaderQuery.value: SELECT PROV_LOC.SRC_SYS_CD_SK as TRGT_SRC_SYS_CD_SK, PROV_LOC.PROV_ID as TRGT_PROV_ID, PROV_LOC.PROV_ADDR_ID as TRGT_PROV_ADDR_ID, PROV_LOC.PROV_ADDR_TYP_CD_SK as TRGT_PROV_ADDR_TYP_CD_SK, PROV_LOC.PROV_ADDR_EFF_DT_SK as TRGT_PROV_ADDR_EFF_DT_SK, B_PROV_LOC.SRC_SYS_CD_SK as SRC_SRC_SYS_CD_SK, B_PROV_LOC.PROV_ID as SRC_PROV_ID, B_PROV_LOC.PROV_ADDR_ID as SRC_PROV_ADDR_ID, B_PROV_LOC.PROV_ADDR_TYP_CD_SK as SRC_PROV_ADDR_TYP_CD_SK, B_PROV_LOC.PROV_ADDR_EFF_DT_SK as SRC_PROV_ADDR_EFF_DT_SK FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.CD_MPPNG MPPNG, @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.PROV_LOC PROV_LOC FULL OUTER JOIN @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.B_PROV_LOC B_PROV_LOC ON PROV_LOC.SRC_SYS_CD_SK = B_PROV_LOC.SRC_SYS_CD_SK AND PROV_LOC.PROV_ID = B_PROV_LOC.PROV_ID AND PROV_LOC.PROV_ADDR_ID = B_PROV_LOC.PROV_ADDR_ID AND PROV_LOC.PROV_ADDR_TYP_CD_SK = B_PROV_LOC.PROV_ADDR_TYP_CD_SK AND PROV_LOC.PROV_ADDR_EFF_DT_SK = B_PROV_LOC.PROV_ADDR_EFF_DT_SK WHERE PROV_LOC.LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK >= @{pipeline().parameters.ExtrRunCycle} AND PROV_LOC.SRC_SYS_CD_SK = MPPNG.CD_MPPNG_SK AND MPPNG.TRGT_CD = 'BCA'

text.value: DROP TABLE IF EXISTS @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_ids_staging}.Res_TMP_IdsFepProvLocRowCntBal; SELECT TRGT_SRC_SYS_CD_SK, TRGT_PROV_ID, TRGT_PROV_ADDR_ID, TRGT_PROV_ADDR_TYP_CD_SK, TRGT_PROV_ADDR_EFF_DT_SK, SRC_SRC_SYS_CD_SK, SRC_PROV_ID, SRC_PROV_ADDR_ID, SRC_PROV_ADDR_TYP_CD_SK, SRC_PROV_ADDR_EFF_DT_SK INTO @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_ids_staging}.Res_TMP_IdsFepProvLocRowCntBal FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_ids_staging}.TMP_IdsFepProvLocRowCntBal WHERE TRGT_SRC_SYS_CD_SK IS NULL OR TRGT_PROV_ID IS NULL OR TRGT_PROV_ADDR_ID IS NULL OR TRGT_PROV_ADDR_TYP_CD_SK IS NULL OR TRGT_PROV_ADDR_EFF_DT_SK IS NULL OR SRC_SRC_SYS_CD_SK IS NULL OR SRC_PROV_ID IS NULL OR SRC_PROV_ADDR_ID IS NULL OR SRC_PROV_ADDR_TYP_CD_SK IS NULL OR SRC_PROV_ADDR_EFF_DT_SK IS NULL; DROP TABLE IF EXISTS @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_ids_staging}.Not_TMP_IdsFepProvLocRowCntBal; SELECT 'ROW COUNT BALANCING BCA FEP - IDS PROV LOC OUT OF TOLERANCE' as NOTIFICATION INTO @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_ids_staging}.Not_TMP_IdsFepProvLocRowCntBal FROM (SELECT 1 as dummy) t WHERE '@{pipeline().parameters.ToleranceCd}'='OUT' AND (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_ids_staging}.TMP_IdsFepProvLocRowCntBal)>0;
